title: SequenceFile Entry Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory houses the 'EntryFileIO.java' file, which is responsible for managing the writing and reading of 'FileEntry' objects to and from a SequenceFile. The core functionality is encapsulated in the 'EntryWriter' class, which uses a blocking queue to manage entries for writing, processed by a dedicated thread. This directory implements the Producer pattern, where 'EntryFileIO' acts as the producer, preparing data for consumption by other components. It interacts with Hadoop's SequenceFile class for file management, and utilizes multi-threading for efficient I/O operations. The class provides methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread for queuing and processing entries for writing.

This directory implements the Producer pattern, where 'EntryFileIO' acts as the producer, preparing data for consumption by other components.
